# VERIFY: #67 — feat: create /ship high-order play for autonomous branch-to-main delivery
<!-- Generated by start-feature-planning | Plan sub-agent output -->

**Intent:** Verify that the `/ship` high-order play is structurally correct, behaviorally sound, integrated correctly with modified atomic plays and the expanded repo-orchestrator, respects all applicable ADRs, and delivers zero-friction autonomous branch-to-main delivery.

---

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Play directory `core/components/plays/ship/` exists with SKILL.md, `reference/intent.yaml`, `templates/checkpoint.md`, `templates/guardian-decision.md`, `templates/final-report.md`
- [ ] SKILL.md frontmatter declares `name: ship`, `user-invocable: true`, `model: sonnet`, `allowed-tools: Task, Read, Write, TaskCreate, TaskUpdate, TaskList, TaskGet`
- [ ] Version table in SKILL.md declares `Level: L2`, `Version: 1.0.0`, `Distinct Agents: 2`
- [ ] `reference/intent.yaml` contains all pre-flight constraints C1–C3, all behavioral constraints C4–C11, and all failure conditions F1–F7
- [ ] `## Intent` section in SKILL.md has the standard load directive referencing `reference/intent.yaml` (not duplicating it inline)
- [ ] Play uses at most 2 distinct agents (repo-orchestrator, project-orchestrator via commit-code L1) — within the L2 ≤5 limit
- [ ] Guardian logic is defined entirely inline in SKILL.md; no reference to `workflow-guardian` agent appears anywhere in the file
- [ ] Steps 1 and 2 invoke `commit-code` and `create-pr` L1s via the Skill tool with `ship_context.auto_approve: true` in play context
- [ ] Steps 3, 4, and 5 invoke `repo-orchestrator` directly with scoped play context blocks
- [ ] Skip-logic handles three conditions: (a) no uncommitted changes → skip step 1, (b) PR already exists → skip step 2, (c) both → skip 1 and 2
- [ ] Self-resolution explicitly lists CANNOT: change code, change documentation. CAN: retry operations, create issues, adjust PR metadata, rebase, delete/recreate branches. Max attempt counts defined for each strategy
- [ ] Evidence path in Step 6 is `.meridian/{issue}/evidence/ship/{YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS}.md` — matches `config.yaml` STM structure
- [ ] `templates/checkpoint.md` contains all ADR 008 mandatory fields: Metadata (Issue, Play, Step, Created, Status, Branch, Target), Task List, Completed Outputs, Guardian Decisions, Current Step, Inputs Needed to Continue
- [ ] `templates/guardian-decision.md` contains: step name, decision (AUTO-APPROVE|HALT), reason, evidence summary, blockers (HALT only), self-resolution attempted, Tether/Vanish (HALT only)
- [ ] `templates/final-report.md` contains: Delivery Summary table (issue, branch, PR, URL, merge commit, strategy, base), Steps Executed table, Guardian Decisions table, Evidence link, Issues Created section
- [ ] Guardian halt presentation in SKILL.md includes: blocker description, intent preserved statement, completed steps summary, failed step detail, Tether/Vanish options, self-resolution record
- [ ] Recovery section: pre-flight failures are hard halts; runtime failures load `docs/framework/intent-driven-recovery.md`; max 2 retries specified
- [ ] SKILL.md Role section forbids `Bash`, `Grep`, `Glob`, and direct `git`/`gh` commands by the orchestrator
- [ ] `commit-code` Step 3 checks `ship_context.auto_approve: true` as the FIRST check; when true, writes checkpoint artifact with Status: AUTO_APPROVED and proceeds without user prompt
- [ ] `create-pr` Step 2 checks `ship_context.auto_approve: true` AND `must_have_fail == 0` before C5 enforcement; bypasses prompt only when both conditions hold
- [ ] `repo-orchestrator.md` BASH USAGE table updated with two named write exceptions: `gh pr merge --squash --delete-branch {pr_number}` and `git checkout {base_branch} && git pull`
- [ ] Play deploys correctly to `~/.claude/skills/ship/SKILL.md` after running `/sync-claude`
- [ ] `docs/components/plays.md` updated to list `/ship` as the first high-order play with its play location entry

---

## Verification Steps

| Gate | Method | Expected Outcome |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| G-001: Directory structure | `ls core/components/plays/ship/` and check subdirs | SKILL.md, reference/intent.yaml, templates/ with 3 template files all present |
| G-002: SKILL.md frontmatter | Read first 8 lines of SKILL.md | `name: ship`, `user-invocable: true`, `model: sonnet`, allowed-tools correct |
| G-003: Level L2 declaration | Read Version table in SKILL.md | `Level \| L2` present; `Distinct Agents \| 2` present |
| G-004: intent.yaml completeness | Read intent.yaml; count C and F entries | C1–C3 pre_flight, C4–C11 behavioral (8 entries), F1–F7 failure_conditions (7 entries) |
| G-005: Intent load directive | Read `## Intent` section of SKILL.md | Load directive referencing `reference/intent.yaml` present; no inline constraint duplication |
| G-006: Agent limit | Count distinct agent names in SKILL.md workflow (excluding L1 skill calls) | Exactly 1 direct agent: repo-orchestrator. project-orchestrator used only via commit-code L1 |
| G-007: Inline guardian | Grep SKILL.md for `workflow-guardian` | Zero matches; guardian decision matrix present within workflow section |
| G-008: L1 invocations | Read Steps 1–2 in SKILL.md | Step 1 invokes commit-code via Skill tool; Step 2 invokes create-pr via Skill tool; both pass `ship_context.auto_approve: true` |
| G-009: Skip-logic | Read Step 0 output contract and Steps 1–2 precondition checks | Three skip conditions (no changes, PR exists, both) documented and handled |
| G-010: Self-resolution scope | Read self-resolution section in SKILL.md | CANNOT list excludes code/docs; CAN list present; max attempt counts defined |
| G-011: Evidence path | Read Step 6 (Report) | Path is `.meridian/{issue}/evidence/ship/{YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS}.md` |
| G-012: Checkpoint template | Read `templates/checkpoint.md` | All ADR 008 mandatory fields present |
| G-013: Guardian-decision template | Read `templates/guardian-decision.md` | All required fields present including HALT-conditional sections |
| G-014: Final report template | Read `templates/final-report.md` | All required sections present |
| G-015: Halt presentation | Read guardian halt section in SKILL.md | All required elements present |
| G-016: Recovery section | Read `## Recovery` in SKILL.md | Pre-flight = hard halt; runtime = load intent-driven-recovery.md; max retries = 2 |
| G-017: Forbidden tools | Read `## Role` in SKILL.md | Bash/Grep/Glob/git/gh listed as forbidden for orchestrator |
| G-018: Orchestrator-owned steps | Read Steps 0, 3 guardian evaluations, Step 6 report | All marked "orchestrator owns" |
| G-019: NWWI enforcement | Read C3 in intent.yaml and evidence path template | Issue number required at pre-flight; `{issue}` used throughout paths |
| G-020: commit-code modification | Read commit-code Step 3 checkpoint logic | `ship_context.auto_approve` check is FIRST in Step 3; bypasses user prompt; still writes artifact |
| G-021: create-pr modification | Read create-pr Step 2 checkpoint logic | `ship_context.auto_approve` + `must_have_fail == 0` check present before C5 enforcement |
| G-022: repo-orchestrator scope | Read BASH USAGE section in repo-orchestrator.md | Both write exceptions present with rationale |
| G-023: Deployment | Check `~/.claude/skills/ship/SKILL.md` | File exists after `/sync-claude` |
| G-024: Docs update | Read `docs/components/plays.md` play location listing | `/ship` play entry present |

---

## Edge Cases

| Scenario | Expected Behavior |
|----------|------------------|
| Branch has no uncommitted changes AND no PR exists | Skip step 1 (commit), execute steps 2–5 normally |
| Branch has no uncommitted changes AND PR already exists | Skip steps 1 and 2, proceed to step 3 (review) with existing PR number |
| Branch has uncommitted changes AND PR already exists | Execute step 1 (commit), skip step 2 (create-pr), proceed to step 3 with existing PR number |
| All steps skipped (clean branch, existing merged PR) | Pre-flight C1 catches "on protected branch" if user merged manually; if branch still feature branch, step 4 will find PR already merged and handle gracefully |
| Merge conflict detected at step 4 | HALT. Self-resolution: attempt rebase. If still conflicted, create GitHub issue. Present Tether/Vanish |
| CI checks failing when merge attempted | HALT. Record in evidence. Present blocker. Do NOT force merge |
| Branch deletion fails after merge | Record in evidence as non-critical warning. Do NOT halt — merge already succeeded |
| `git checkout {base} && git pull` fails — dirty working tree | repo-orchestrator self-recovery: stash, checkout, pop stash. If still failing, HALT with warning |
| `commit-code` L1 itself halts (user typed Vanish within L1 despite auto_approve bypass) | ship receives failure signal. Guardian evaluates. ship HALTS — F7 condition |
| `create-pr` creates a draft PR | Guardian notes in evidence but does NOT halt — draft PRs can be reviewed and merged |
| `analyze-pr` finds REVIEW-status must-have items (not FAIL) | Guardian auto-approves with warnings in evidence — REVIEW is not FAIL |
| `analyze-pr` finds FAIL-status must-have item | Guardian HALTS — F5 condition. Presents blocker with Tether/Vanish |
| Network failure during `gh pr merge` | Self-resolve: retry once after delay. If still failing, HALT — create tracking issue. Max 2 retries |
| Issue number not in branch name | Pre-flight C3 fails — hard halt before any work begins |
| `/ship` invoked from main branch | Pre-flight C1 fails — hard halt: "Protected branch — cannot ship from main" |
| PR review finds warnings (nice-to-have FAIL) only | Guardian auto-approves — nice-to-have FAIL items are not blockers |
